questions.question: What famous landmark or landmark scene is shown in this image?
questions.rgb_answer: The image shows the Taj Mahal, a renowned mausoleum located in Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is an ivory-white marble mausoleum on the right bank of the Yamuna River, about 20 kilometers from Agra. The Taj Mahal is an iconic example of Mughal architecture, recognized for its aesthetic beauty and historical significance.
